finish_profile.source_label: PokeBeach Ascended Heroes set guide reverse holo rule

reverse.basis: ThePriceDex lists 178 main-set reverseHolofoil variants; CardDeckr describes 140 Energy pattern reverse variants plus 38 Trainer reverse variants.

pokeball.basis: PokeBeach says non-Team Rocket non-ex Pokemon receive a Poke Ball reverse lane; ThePriceDex identifies 130 non-Team Rocket non-ex Pokemon in the main set.

rocket_reverse.basis: PokeBeach says Team Rocket Pokemon use an R reverse in place of the Poke Ball lane; ThePriceDex identifies 10 non-ex Team Rocket Pokemon in the main set.

masterball.basis: No source-backed Ascended Heroes finish profile includes Master Ball reverse; this finish is explicitly not applicable for this set.

finish_profile.notes: Ascended Heroes uses Energy reverse, Poke Ball reverse, and Team Rocket R reverse lanes; Master Ball reverse is not part of this set profile.
